module.name: statdelta
module.description: A row of KPI stats each with a value and an up/down change (▲/▼, coloured). For dashboards and results slides.
module.aiSpec:
A row of KPI STATS each showing a big value and a CHANGE (delta) with an up/down arrow, coloured green/red. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one stat per section written on up to three lines: line 1 = the big VALUE (e.g. $1.2M, 98%), line 2 = the LABEL, line 3 = the CHANGE (e.g. +12%, -3pt) — a leading + is up/green, - is down/red. `invert: true` flips the colours (for metrics where down is good).
<!-- @statdelta --> $1.2M Revenue +12% <!-- @ --> 4.8% Churn -0.5pt <!-- @end -->
